rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation in the endogeneity section, where the authors note prior applications of the latent instrumental variable approach. The citing paper relies conceptually on Ebbes et al. (2005) for the method and does not discuss the cited paper's customer satisfaction theory, constructs, findings, or implications. There is no distinct role for this specific paper in hypothesis development, model design, or interpretation beyond being an example of prior usage.
